heading: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
body:
RAG allows you to combine language models with your own data by
retrieving relevant context before generating
responses. This pattern allows you to build AI applications that provide
more accurate and domain-specific responses grounded in your custom data.

To learn more and get started, see [Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with MongoDB](avs-rag).

You can also implement RAG locally, without the need for API (Application Programming Interface) keys from LLM providers.
To learn more, see [Build a Local RAG Implementation with MongoDB Vector Search](local-rag).
